name: claude-code-resume
description: fzf-style picker for Claude Code sessions with highlighted-match preview

scripts.install:local: bun run build && mkdir -p ~/.local/bin && rm -f ~/.local/bin/ccresume && cp dist/ccresume ~/.local/bin/ccresume && codesign --force --sign - ~/.local/bin/ccresume && echo 'installed: ~/.local/bin/ccresume'
